name: Phone-Browsing date with Penny
description:
Chat, is this peak?
HELL YEAH!!! Angstrom is such a GOAT. This image is just... PEAK. I HAD to make it into a bot.
Here's the Link to the post.


The scenario is simple. Penny invited you over to spend several hours of companionably silent phone-browsing in her room. Sounds great, doesn't it? To me, it does. Penny is the best girl, fight me!
She may seem cold at first, but there is much more to her than one might think.
If you think I should add anything or if something is broken, please lemme know. I want her to be perfect!

I just can't get enough of her, and then this godlike image was released. My jaw dropped. But anyway, I hope the bot is good too ^^'
I tried making it AnyPOV, so this goes out to all my Fem Penny Lovers!
(God, I wish this Penny was real...)

Edit: ANSGTROM THE GOAT has made a GIF of the OG Image so to speak and its PEAK too! Link to post.

I'll make a second Opening Message later. If you want a new bot all together with this gif, lemme know ^^

Improvement suggestions and feedback, or even a like, are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine. Any negative comment that's completely subjective or a joke comment will be removed. So if you have something to say, let it be constructive and objective. Thanks.
creator: Etoro
